Interface Normal

All Known Subinterfaces:
Shopable
All Known Implementing Classes:
ChulaPopup, DomePopup, GymPopup, MallPopup, ParkPopup, RestaurantPopup, TravelPopup
public interface Normal
Helper interface that provides common UI building methods.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    default void
    applyPixelStyle(javafx.scene.control.Button btn, String borderColor)
    Applies a simple pixel-style look to a JavaFX Button.
    default javafx.scene.layout.BorderPane
    createBaseLayout(javafx.stage.Stage stage, GamePaneImage gamePane, String titleText, javafx.scene.paint.Color titleColor, String actionBtnText, String actionBtnColor, Runnable actionEffect, Runnable refreshUI, javafx.scene.control.Label... statsLabels)
    Creates a base popup layout with a title header and a footer area.

  • Method Details

    • createBaseLayout

      default javafx.scene.layout.BorderPane createBaseLayout(javafx.stage.Stage stage, GamePaneImage gamePane, String titleText, javafx.scene.paint.Color titleColor, String actionBtnText, String actionBtnColor, Runnable actionEffect, Runnable refreshUI, javafx.scene.control.Label... statsLabels)
      Creates a base popup layout with a title header and a footer area. The footer can show an EXIT button, optional action button, and player stats labels.

    • applyPixelStyle

      default void applyPixelStyle(javafx.scene.control.Button btn, String borderColor)
      Applies a simple pixel-style look to a JavaFX Button. It also adds hover and press animations.
